notes: Hardened src/storage.ts by introducing a structured StorageError with codes, operation names, file paths, and JSONL line/partial metadata.
Fixed tryReadJson to throw contextual StorageError instances for non-ENOENT read failures and malformed JSON instead of generic errors.
Fixed readJsonl to return [] on missing files but throw structured parse/read errors, including line number and partial=true for truncated final JSONL lines.
Fixed appendJsonl and overwriteJsonl to wrap directory creation, serialization, and write failures in structured StorageError instances for consistent write-failure reporting.

Verified behavior with a targeted test: npx tsx tests/storage-error-handling.test.ts. Also ran npm run typecheck, which still fails due to pre-existing src/cli.ts TypeScript issues unrelated to this storage change.
